approved.label: Active noise control
approved.description: Active control of acoustic noise and sound fields.

approved.label: Acoustic echo cancellation
approved.description: Echo-path modelling, cancellation, and residual echo suppression.

approved.label: Speech enhancement
approved.description: Denoising, dereverberation, and intelligibility enhancement for speech.

approved.label: Source separation
approved.description: Separation and extraction of individual acoustic sources.

approved.label: Beamforming & arrays
approved.description: Microphone and loudspeaker arrays, beamforming, and array processing.

approved.label: Spatial audio
approved.description: Spatial sound capture, rendering, reproduction, and perception.

approved.label: Audio coding
approved.description: Audio compression, representation, transmission, and quality assessment.

approved.label: Room acoustics
approved.description: Room impulse responses, reverberation, sound-field modelling, and treatment.

approved.label: Machine learning for audio
approved.description: Machine-learning methods whose central contribution concerns audio or acoustics.

approved.label: Fundamentals & DSP
approved.description: Foundational signal processing, estimation, filtering, and control methods.

approved.label: Other
approved.description: Literature that does not yet fit an approved research domain.
